title: profile create writes env vars to settings.json that codex CLI never reads — wrapper exports CODEX_HOME only, so local OpenAI-compat providers fall through to ChatGPT login flow. Repro: sweech profile create --cli codex --provider ollama --base-url http://127.0.0.1:9058/v1 --api-key dummy then sweech use → codex shows the OAuth login screen. Fix: either (a) wrapper sources env from settings.json before exec codex, or (b) sweech writes a proper [model_providers] block in CODEX_HOME/config.toml. Also: codex 0.x dropped wire_api=chat; only wire_api=responses works, so plain llama.cpp servers need a Responses-API translator (LiteLLM) in front.
